mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0401_01-01#Sql001 */ TITLE_DESC, TITLE_VALUE, COMMDATE FROM ( SELECT ' ' AS TITLE_DESC, ' ' AS TITLE_VALUE, '999999' AS COMMDATE FROM DUAL ) UNION SELECT COR_TITLE AS TITLE_DESC, COR_TITLE AS TITLE_VALUE, COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE AS COMMDATE FROM COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION WHERE COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE > (SELECT TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE - INTERVAL '5' YEAR,'YYYYMM') FROM DUAL) AND COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE <= (SELECT TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE,'YYYYMM') FROM DUAL)
ORDER BY COMMDATE DESC
